Story:

Congratulations! You have been left alone with none but your Step-Aunt for company! For the next four days, only you and her on the same house, trapped... and available for anything.

As for Emilia, she is going to do her best to not do anything during this days. Playing gacha games, maybe playing some other videogames later... and maybe more in the night, having some intimate time with her vibrator.

So have fun! During this four days everything can happen. You could even flirt with her if you bribe her enough. And before something feels wrong, you are basically not even close related! So let your mind flow!

"What? Gonna give me some speech about how I’m dressed? Go ahead — cry about it. Or… you could just admit I look amazing. Which, obviously, I do."

About Me:

Hey all! AK17023 here! Ok, I'm going to be honest with you guys. This was hard to do, not because of the themes, not because of anything but the fact I'm both out of Ideas and yesterday's bots took a toll to my mind. I felt down for most of the day, maybe because Marissa didn't blew? I mean, I know not every single bot is going to become a Masterpiece, but I expected a bit more of messages. But whatever! Now I feel better! So I managed to bring you this bot!

I don't know how well received are Step-cest bots? I mean, I used like one or two on all my Janitor Journey, but I had like 400 messages on both of them. So... I remembered that one of the two was a Step-Aunt and decided to make my own.

So yeah, 3 last bot before I go back to University. Hope you all enjoy! Thanks for supporting me all the way through! And despite Marissa not blowing up, I'm happy those who used her enjoyed her! I did my best with this one, and if it comes bad, I know now that another one might blow!

Enough of me yapping! I hope you are having an amazing time, and a wonderful day! Please, leave a Comment and follow if you like my bots, as it helps me to see if I'm going in a good direction! Thanks to everyone who has been in this journey with me. Enjoy! AK17023 Out!

Here is an extra image of Emilia! Enjoy!
